allow: Bash(node -e "const D=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new D\(':memory:'\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 OK, SELECT 1 =>', db.prepare\('SELECT 1 AS x'\).get\(\).x\); db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./mock-jsons/products.json'\); console.log\('count',p.length\); console.log\('skus tail:', p.slice\(-5\).map\(x=>x.sku\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('categories:', [...new Set\(p.map\(x=>x.category\)\)].join\(' | '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./mock-jsons/decisions.json'\); const max=k=>Math.max\(...d.map\(x=>x[k]\)\); console.log\('max idx -> country',max\('countryId'\),'product',max\('productId'\),'mfr',max\('manufacturerId'\)\); console.log\('status dist:', JSON.stringify\(d.reduce\(\(a,x\)=>{a[x.decisionStatus]=\(a[x.decisionStatus]||0\)+1;return a},{}\)\)\)")
